description_long: This is a modern, compact desk constructed from light-colored wood or wood laminate, featuring a spacious rectangular work surface. On one side, it has an elevated shelf that creates a two-tiered area, ideal for placing monitors or office accessories. Below the shelf, there are two drawers with metallic handles, providing storage for office supplies or personal items. The desk's design includes a cut-out section on the upper tier, adding visual interest and ergonomic utility. The overall structure is supported by sturdy side panels, ensuring stability. The finish is smooth with a subtle wood grain pattern, giving it a contemporary and clean appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A light wood desk with a two-tiered surface, integrated shelf, and two drawers with metal handles, featuring a modern, clean design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main work surface, elevated shelf, and open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the panels, and the profile of the upper shelf.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the two drawers, metal handles, and the open workspace above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the layered construction of the shelf and drawers.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, with the elevated shelf positioned to the user's right.
